response.justification: Sarah has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and exposure to AI-agent tooling, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product leadership, cloud platform strategy experience, or advanced AI education — key requirements for this director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Proven entrepreneurial spirit with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Deep full-stack fluency across languages and systems including DLang, Node.js, and cloud infra
Demonstrated technical teaching and community leadership through workshops and talks
concerns: No explicit AI/ML product development or cloud platform strategy experience shown
Lacks advanced degree in AI or related field; education is BS in Computer Science only
Limited evidence of advising strategic customers or driving AI differentiation at scale
